metadata.title:
ADOPT DIES MONIES PLAN


AND BE THROUGH WITH IT

pages.raw_text:
Someone has blundered in the
work of amending our city charter,
and like the Frenchman said,
think blunder is worse than a
crime" said Judge l.. b. Nash to-
day. Judge Nash led the fight for
the adoption of the charter amend
ments and was the man who sug-
gested a new charter in the OPP
timists' dinner during the winter


"In amending city charter 1t is
like repairing an old wagon or an
old house-the repairs only help TO
point out the defects of the old
portions retained Here we are
now in tangle that may require
months to straighten out and then
what will we have after all?


LAS ! said on the occasion of the
dinner given by lot of public
spirited gentlemen during the win
ter, think our charter 10 cumbsr-
